description_long: This is a single-story bungalow surrounded by a neatly trimmed hedge, featuring a paved driveway leading to the entrance. The front facade includes a covered porch with a gabled roof and large windows, providing a welcoming entryway. The layout reveals multiple rooms, including a spacious living area, bedrooms, and a kitchen, all arranged in an open-plan style. The backyard is landscaped with trees and shrubs, and includes a wooden deck area with lounge chairs and a rectangular swimming pool. The exterior walls are primarily white, complemented by wooden accents and large glass windows that allow ample natural light. The overall design is modern yet cozy, with a focus on outdoor living and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a gabled porch, large windows, a landscaped backyard, and a swimming pool, all enclosed by a green hedge.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gabled porch, main entrance, driveway, and symmetrical landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, visible chimneys, and the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden deck, lounge area, swimming pool, and garden landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side elevation, window arrangement, and part of the backyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
